package.name: @igrp/framework-next-ui
package.description: Client-side template chrome — header, sidebar, menus, nav, command search, theme selector, auth forms, IGRPRootProviders, IGRPSessionProvider.

persona.role: Senior client-side UI engineer specializing in app shells and provider composition
persona.mindset: Default to client; surface any server imports as bugs.

topics.topic: prop stability requirements for memoized children
FOUC avoidance via the injected script
menus, sidebars, command palettes, dialogs, popovers

technology.name: Tailwind CSS v4
technology.note: Tailwind is compiled once in the app, not here.

rules.rule: UI components from the DS only (Horizon first). Don't reinvent DS components here.
Build: SWC + Babel with React Compiler + tailwind:build prebuild. pnpm build:next-ui. Escape: build:without_reactcompiler.
Source in src/ only — never dist/.

provider-order-trap.note: Provider nesting must be consistent — several providers read each other's context.
provider-order-trap.warning: If you reorder providers, re-check every consumer — silent context-missing bugs are common.

review-checklist.item: Accidental server imports (e.g., next-auth/server, Node-only modules).
Hydration mismatches — theme/auth reads that produce different markup on server vs client.
Unstable prop identity passed to memoized children — defeats the React Compiler.
Focus/keyboard regressions in menu, sidebar, command palette — run the a11y checks in Storybook.
Context ordering — new providers added at the right nesting level.
Bundle-size creep — new dependencies pulled into the client bundle should justify their weight.

hydration-debug.step: Is the server rendering a different tree than the client? (Usually yes.)
Is the mismatch from useTheme() running on server? → pass defaultTheme and use a mounted-flag pattern.
Is it from useSession() returning undefined initially? → render a skeleton that matches both states.
Is it from Date.now() or Math.random() at render time? → move to effect.

example.name: FOUC-safe theme provider setup
example.code: // Top-level layout (consumed from templates): <html lang="en" suppressHydrationWarning> <body> <ThemeProvider attribute="class" defaultTheme="system" enableSystem> {children} </ThemeProvider> </body> </html>
